Title: User successfully logs in as Admin
Test Steps:
1. User enters "admin" as username and "admin_password" as password.
2. User clicks login button.
Expected Result: User is logged in as Admin and redirected to the admin dashboard.

Title: User fails to log in as Admin due to incorrect password
Test Steps:
1. User enters "admin" as username and "wrong_password" as password.
2. User clicks login button.
Expected Result: Login fails and an error message is displayed.

Title: User fails to log in as Admin due to incorrect username
Test Steps:
1. User enters "wrong_username" as username and "admin_password" as password.
2. User clicks login button.
Expected Result: Login fails and an error message is displayed.

Title: User successfully views a product
Test Steps:
1. User logs in with valid credentials.
2. User navigates to the product page with name "example_product".
Expected Result: User sees the product details.

Title: Admin successfully edits a product
Test Steps:
1. Admin logs in with valid credentials.
2. Admin navigates to the product page with name "example_product".
3. Admin edits the product description to "Updated description".
Expected Result: Product description is updated successfully.

Title: User successfully adds a product to cart
Test Steps:
1. User logs in with valid credentials.
2. User navigates to the product page with name "example_product".
3. User clicks "Add to Cart" button.
Expected Result: Product is added to the cart and the cart total is updated.

Title: User successfully removes a product from cart
Preconditions: User is logged in and has items in the cart.
Test Steps:
1. User logs in with valid credentials.
2. User navigates to the cart page.
3. User selects "example_product" and clicks "Remove" button.
Expected Result: Product is removed from the cart and the cart total is updated.

Title: Admin successfully places an order
Preconditions: Admin is logged in and has items in the cart.
Test Steps:
1. Admin logs in with valid credentials.
2. Admin navigates to the cart page.
3. Admin clicks "Place Order" button.
Expected Result: Order is placed successfully and the cart is cleared.

Title: Admin successfully cancels an order
Preconditions: Admin is logged in and has an order.
Test Steps:
1. Admin logs in with valid credentials.
2. Admin navigates to the order page with id "12345".
3. Admin clicks "Cancel Order" button.
Expected Result: Order is canceled successfully.

Title: User successfully triggers a notification
Test Data: user_id=12345, message="Hello, this is a test notification."
Test Steps:
1. User logs in with valid credentials.
2. User triggers the notification process.
3. User sends the notification with the message "Hello, this is a test notification."
Expected Result: Notification is sent successfully.

Title: User fails to trigger a notification due to invalid user ID
Test Data: user_id=invalid_user_id, message="Hello, this is a test notification."
Test Steps:
1. User logs in with valid credentials.
2. User triggers the notification process with an invalid user ID.
3. User sends the notification with the message "Hello, this is a test notification."
Expected Result: Notification fails to send and an error message is displayed.

Title: User successfully adds a new product
Test Steps:
1. User logs in with valid credentials.
2. User navigates to the product management page.
3. User adds a new product with name "new_product", price "10.99", and description "New product description".
Expected Result: New product is added successfully and the product list is updated.

Title: User fails to add a new product due to empty product name
Test Steps:
1. User logs in with valid credentials.
2. User navigates to the product management page.
3. User attempts to add a new product with an empty product name.
Expected Result: Product addition fails and an error message is displayed.

Title: User fails to add a new product due to invalid price
Test Steps:
1. User logs in with valid credentials.
2. User navigates to the product management page.
3. User attempts to add a new product with a negative price.
Expected Result: Product addition fails and an error message is displayed.

Title: User successfully removes a product
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a product in the system.
Test Steps:
1. User logs in with valid credentials.
2. User navigates to the product management page.
3. User selects "existing_product" and clicks "Remove" button.
Expected Result: Product is removed successfully and the product list is updated.

Title: User fails to remove a product due to non-existent product name
Test Steps:
1. User logs in with valid credentials.
2. User navigates to the product management page.
3. User attempts to remove a non-existent product.
Expected Result: Product removal fails and an error message is displayed.

Title: User fails to remove a product due to invalid product name
Test Steps:

2. User navigates to the product management page.
3. User attempts to remove a product with an empty product name.
Expected Result: Product removal fails and an error message is displayed.

Test Steps:

2. User navigates to the product management page.
3. User retrieves the product with name "existing_product".

Test Steps:

Title: User successfully updates a product's price
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a product in the system.

2. User navigates to the product management page.
3. User selects "existing_product" and updates its price to "20.99".
